viral_posts.hook: Where could you be six months from today?

viral_posts.hook: If you want to figure out your exact numbers, based on your exact offer, I’ve built a free
viral_posts.caption:
If you want to figure out your exact numbers, based on your exact offer, I’ve built a free tool that helps you build the offer, and then plan the numbers in under 10 minutes… it’s pretty cool. 

Comment “offer” and I’ll send it to you

Packaging > everything. 

An incredible video with average packaging won’t be seen.

Incredible packaging, with an average video will be seen by millions.

Now, that’s not to say that you shouldn’t put effort into the video. Great packaging, and a great video will not only be seen, but then result in real fans and business. 

BUT, if you’ve got limited time, and you’re going to place your focus anywhere, it should be on packaging.
